name: Sprint 21

tasks.title: Lighthouse SEO CI enforcement and og:image - change lighthouserc.js SEO assertion from warn to error and add og:image meta tag to root layout (content audit findings F-005 F-006)
tasks.description: Lighthouse SEO CI enforcement and og:image - change lighthouserc.js SEO assertion from warn to error and add og:image meta tag to root layout (content audit findings F-005 F-006)
tasks.summary: lighthouserc.js SEO assertions use level error not warn; og:image meta tag defined in root layout metadata; all 25 public pages inherit og:image for social sharing previews; Lighthouse CI blocks on SEO regression
tasks.definitionOfDone: lighthouserc.js SEO assertions use level error not warn; og:image meta tag defined in root layout metadata; all 25 public pages inherit og:image for social sharing previews; Lighthouse CI blocks on SEO regression; verified by: pnpm test && pnpm run lighthouse
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: lighthouserc.js SEO assertions use level error not warn; og:image meta tag defined in root layout metadata; all 25 public pages inherit og:image for social sharing previews; Lighthouse CI blocks on SEO regression

tasks.title: Analytics Dashboard Endpoint Wiring. Wire 9 dead analytics router endpoints: exportConversionFunnel, exportMetrics, exportReport, getConversionFunnel, getLeadMetrics, getOverview, getSalesMetrics, getTimeSeriesData, leadStats. Backend built (ANALYTICS-001), zero web callers. Decision: wire to analytics dashboard UI (IFC-037) with charts/export buttons. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 20-28.
tasks.description: Analytics Dashboard Endpoint Wiring. Wire 9 dead analytics router endpoints: exportConversionFunnel, exportMetrics, exportReport, getConversionFunnel, getLeadMetrics, getOverview, getSalesMetrics, getTimeSeriesData, leadStats. Backend built (ANALYTICS-001), zero web callers. Decision: wire to analytics dashboard UI (IFC-037) with charts/export buttons. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 20-28.
tasks.summary: All 9 analytics endpoints wired to dashboard UI with working charts/exports; zero dead endpoints in analytics router; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: All 9 analytics endpoints wired to dashboard UI with working charts/exports; zero dead endpoints in analytics router; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: All 9 analytics endpoints wired to dashboard UI with working charts/exports; zero dead endpoints in analytics router; tests >=90%
